narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Eldridge St near Delancey — 300 feet from the original Ha's Snack Bar

The follow-up to one of NYC's most acclaimed 2025 openings.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Eldridge St near Delancey — 300 feet from the original Ha's Snack Bar

The follow-up to one of NYC's most acclaimed 2025 openings.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Moodily dark, parchment-skin light fixtures by James Cherry. 45 seats — bigger than the Snack Bar but same vibe.

🍸 The house martini comes with a whole oyster at the bottom.

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

Franco-Vietnamese cooking — fish sauce in everything (literally printed on the check).

𝗦𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀
• House Martini — fish sauce, sea salt, whole oyster at bottom ⭐
• Escargots in Tamarind Butter ⭐
• Pâté Chaud — flaky pastry, vermicelli-stuffed
• Vol-au-Vent — puff-pastry tart (fillings rotate; shaking beef version is best)
• Leeks Vinaigrette — with Maggi, mayo, pickled mussels
• Vitello Tonnato (revisionist) — cold pork loin, tuna-mayo, chile crisp ⭐

𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘀
• Beef Wellington
• Steak Frites
• General Ha's Trotter — high gloss, when available
• Pork Chop — with dried shrimp and chile paste

𝗗𝗼𝗹𝗰𝗶
• Ice Cream Bombes — meringue domes, elaborate (Esther Williams vibes)

⚠️ Skip the "big steak" ($225) — there are better things here.

Note: Menu changes frequently. Don't get attached.

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$$

Dinner for 2: $150-200 (with drinks)

Reservations: Resy (essential — very hot right now)
Walk-ins: Good luck

📸 @has_dac_biet

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Tue–Sat: 5:30–10:30pm
Sun–Mon: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Early seating (5:30pm): Best shot at walk-in, quieter vibe
• Late weeknight: Still sceney but less frantic than weekend
• Avoid: Saturday prime time without reservation — packed

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗟 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗟

From: The Crosby Street Hotel, 79 Crosby St, New York, NY 10012, USA
To: 137 Eldridge St, New York, NY 10002

• walking: 12 mins • 0.5 mi
• transit: 12 mins • 0.5 mi
• driving: 9 mins • 1.0 mi (traffic: 9 mins)
• bicycling: 7 mins • 0.8 mi

Best modality: WALKING ⭐
Why: Walk is convenient (12 mins)
